ignoreModals.validation: Are you sure you want to enable this plugin?

allButtonMode.desc: Display all buttons (source, reading, live) regardless the active mode.
allButtonMode.title: "All button" mode

includeReadingMode.desc: Include reading mode in the switch. You can change the order in the settings below.
includeReadingMode.title: Include reading mode

settings.removeButton: Remove the default switch between reading & editing.

reverseButton.desc: Display the next mode button in place of the current one.
reverseButton.title: Reverse button icons
